John De Washbourne II, ancestor of our Washburn lineage.

Sir Roger De Washbourne was born in 1291 in the area of Stanford, England. 

His parents were Sir John De Washbourne and Lady Isabel De Washbo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford於大約1276年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆時，他的父親John d'Wasseburne30歲，母親Isabelle Cassey26歲。他於大約1296年與Margarett在英國武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1353年7月2日之後在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coroner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Crowner
meanings: English (of Norman origin): status name for a coroner, from Middle English corouner ‘coroner’ (Anglo-Norman French coron(i)er, from Old French coro(u)ne ‘crown’), after the Latin title custos placitorum coronæ ‘protector of the pleas of the Crown’.
In some cases probably an Americanized form of German Kroner or Kröner (see Kroner ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford was born about 1276, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John d'Wasseburne, was 30 and his mother, Isabelle Cassey, was 26. He married Margarett about 1296, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 2 July 1353, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford est né environ 1276, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John d'Wasseburne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Cassey, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margarett environ 1296, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 2 juillet 1353, dans sa ville natale.

Er hat um 1296 in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England Margarett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 2. Juli 1353 in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Margarett circa 1296, nel Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 2 luglio 1353, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanfordが約1276年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで生まれた時，父John d'Wasseburneは30歳，母Isabelle Casseyは26歳であった。約1296年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメでMargarettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1353年7月2日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John d'Wasseburne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Cassey(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1296년 영국 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 Margarett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1353년 7월 2일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John d'Wasseburne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Cassey, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margarett aproximadamente 1296, em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 2 de julho de 1353, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Wasseborne Coroner Lord of Washbourne and of Stanford родился около 1276 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John d'Wasseburne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Cassey, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarett около 1296 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 2 июля 1353 г. в его родном городе.
